reason: Pulp Fiction – non-Western crime film intertwining multiple stories in LA.
Schindler’s List – historical drama about saving Jews during WWII.
The Godfather – epic saga of the Corleone family in New York’s underworld.
GoodFellas – true-crime drama chronicling life inside the Mafia.
Forrest Gump – drama following an ordinary man’s extraordinary life.
The Shawshank Redemption – prison drama about hope and resilience behind bars.
Casablanca – classic romantic drama set in WWII-era Morocco.
Star Wars – space epic about the Rebellion’s battle against the Empire.
Apocalypse Now – Vietnam War drama exploring madness on a river journey.
The Silence of the Lambs – psychological thriller with an FBI agent and a killer.
